items.title: Can Djokovic pull off an epic upset over Sinner?
items.summary: Jannik Sinner is the defending Wimbledon champ and No. 1 seed. But Novak Djokovic already has seven titles -- and just had a monumental win.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Born in Leeds, crafted in Norway - Haaland's worlds about to collide
items.summary: Erling Haaland has guided Norway to their first World Cup since 1998. So what is it like being a global name from a nation with a population of just 5.5 million?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Tromp, Fletcher and Russell lift LAKR to No. 3
items.summary: Narine's 1 for 14 in four overs and Russell's two blows in an over restricted Washington Freedom
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
